div.div:
HEADER
Conflict ID · Timestamp · Originating Council · Conflict Type · Last Safe Checkpoint

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 453px; height: 1px; padding-top: 168px; margin-left: 22px;

div.div:
CONFLICT STATEMENT
What is in conflict and which councils are involved · Why autonomous resolution exceeded the permitted threshold

div.div:
EVIDENCE
Applicable specification references · Conflicting council positions (each council's stance) · Prior decisions and precedents

div.div:
OPTIONS
Option A — description · expected outcome · consequences
Option B — description · expected outcome · consequences

div.div:

div.div:
Packages are assembled by the Meta-Council. Human receives a decision brief, not a raw log dump.
Target: human can review and decide in under 15 minutes.

1. ESCALATION TRIGGERED

Decision brief sent · SLA timer starts · Workflow paused at checkpoint
